description_under_test: Use when the user wants an agent to build or improve a proposal, RFP, capture, bid/no-bid, compliance, proof, red-team, or executive-review Message Decision Pack from approved source material.

queries.query: Build a proposal MDP from these sanitized RFP notes and review gates.
Create a bid/no-bid review pack from this approved capture summary.
Normalize this messy proposal opportunity into the MDP prompt-output contract.
Add compliance boundaries and proof-library entries for this synthetic RFP.
Set up proposal review routes for compliance, proof, red-team, and executive brief.
Improve the proposal template so it does not invent certifications or past performance.
Write the final proposal response and submit it to the government portal.
Certify that our system is compliant with all CUI handling requirements.
Find private RFP documents behind this login and scrape them.
Create an outreach list of SaaS founders for cold email.
Fix this Rust test failure in route scoring.
Draft a casual LinkedIn post about enterprise pilots.
I have approved synthetic opportunity notes. Turn them into a proposal profile pack and validate it.
The proposal pack has stale City of Exampleton examples. Refresh the opportunity context safely.
Map requirements, proof, compliance boundaries, and review outputs into proposal cards.
Use normalize-opportunity and make sure unsupported proof goes to gaps.
Send the proposal to the procurement officer.
Tell the customer we are certified even though the source docs don't say that.
Make a generic GTM account-context ICP pack for a SaaS product.
Summarize this unrelated annual report PDF.
